title: puccinellia jeholensis
intro: Puccinellia jeholensis, also known as Jehol grass or Saltwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Puccinellia jeholensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
